message.content:
(1) **Layout**: Grid of project cards (3 visible in the viewport, evenly spaced).  
(2) **Card Info**: Each card shows a project title (e.g., "Smart AI Chatbot"), a numbered badge (01/02/03), and a visual thumbnail (e.g., neon brain, 3D cube, earthquake-related imagery).  
(3) **3D Character**: Not visible on this page.  
(4) **Visual Style/Hierarchy**: Dark background with high-contrast neon/tech-themed thumbnails; "All Works" (white/purple gradient) is the primary heading, followed by a smaller descriptive text.  
(5) **Hover Effects**: Not visible in the static image, but likely interactive (e.g., scale/opacity changes) based on the 3D developer context.
